name: EmbeddedObjectAttributes
summary: The EmbeddedObjectAttributes class contains attributes for embedded objects.

constructors.name: EmbeddedObjectAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EmbeddedObjectAttributes class that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: EmbeddedObjectAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EmbeddedObjectAttributes class that loads given attributes.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The name of the attribute file

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The name of the attribute file.

properties.name: Scaling
properties.summary: Gets or sets the scaling type.

properties.name: XScale
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X scaling value. Changing this property will set the scaling type to ScaleXY.

properties.name: YScale
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y scaling value. Changing this property will set the scaling type to ScaleXY.
